title: OddSense's Troll Resources
description: A resource pack for Minecraft 1.20+ that adds too many troll textures
body:
Previously known as "All in One Troll"

Everything this resource pack consists of:
- Diamond Ore = Stone
- Deepslate Diamond Ore = Deepslate
- Placed String = Invisible
- Powder Snow = Snow
- Creeper = Invisible
- Ancient Debris = Netherrack
- Glow Lichen = Diamond Ore Overlay
- TNT = Dirt
- Totem of Undying = String
- Ghast = Invisible
- Fire Charge / Fireball = Invisible
- Fire = Invisible
- Gold Ore = Coal Ore
- Coal Ore = Gold Ore
- Deepslate Gold Ore = Deepslate Coal Ore
- Deepslate Coal Ore = Deepslate Gold Ore
- Deepslate Emerald Ore = Deepslate
- Blue Axolotl = Invisible
- Cobweb = Invisible
- Birch Leaves = Oak Leaves
- Birch Log = Oak Log
- Bedrock = Deepslate
- Iron Ingot  = Coal
- Iron Golem = Invisible
- Enderman = Invisible
- Iron Ore = Copper Ore
- Deepslate Iron Ore = Deepslate Copper Ore
- Raw Iron = Coal
- Shadows = Invisible
- Obsidian = Invisible
- End Stone = Invisible
- Dragon Egg = Invisible
- Ender Pearl = Blaze Rod
- Blaze Rod = Ender Pearl
